case_title: LAVY, SAGIV VS KHECHUASHVILI, SERGO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LAVY, SAGIV AS TO DEFENDANT KHECHUASHVILI, SERGO SHIKH, YAAKOV ALL AUTOMOTIVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2007 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHIKH, YAAKOV

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAVY, SAGIV IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KHECHUASHVILI, SERGO SHIKH, YAAKOV ALL AUTOMOTIVE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM CORRECTED TO ADD NAME OF DEFENDANT ALL AUTOMOTIVE. DEFENDANT SHIKH, JACOB APPEARS PERSONALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL AUTOMOTIVE AND WAIVES SERVICE AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
